message:
fix(deps): bump frankensqlite to 7846ebf4 for VACUUM autoindex fix (#183)

Updates frankensqlite from 5086fd0d to 7846ebf4, picking up the fix
for VACUUM-induced autoindex corruption: build_create_table_sql was
emitting UNIQUE before PRIMARY KEY in table-level constraints, causing
stock SQLite to assign autoindex ordinals to the wrong columns.

This was the root cause of the "database disk image is malformed"
errors reported in beads_rust#239 and the autoindex corruption aspect
of this issue. Together with the earlier FTS marker fix (f5a41abf)
and the initial frankensqlite bump (16ec37e3), this addresses all
three symptoms: FTS rebuild loop, WAL growth, and autoindex corruption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
